mapper.select: /* SQL ID : AcadSchDAO.select 설 명 : 일정 관리 조회 */ SELECT ACAD_SCH_SN AS acadSchSn , ORG_ID AS orgId , UNIV_CD AS uniCd , SYSJOB_SCHDL_TYCD AS calendarCtgr , CALENDAR_REF_CD AS calendarRefCd , SYSJOB_SCHDL_SYMD AS schStartDt , SYSJOB_SCHDL_EYMD AS schEndDt , ACAD_SCH_NM AS acadSchNm , SCH_CNTS AS schCnts , SCH_CNTS_TYPE AS schCntsType , USEYN AS useYn , RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , MOD_DTTM AS modDttn FROM TB_HOME_ACAD_SCH WHERE ACAD_SCH_SN = #{acadSchSn}
